perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a high-energy interaction in a retail store between a male creator in a purple shirt/cap and a group of female foreign tourists; they are laughing and shouting together. (2) The camera pulls back to show a professional filming crew with a Godox softbox lighting the scene as a crowd of onlookers watches. (3) The creator is shown signing purple boxes of 'SUNTORY PASTRY' for the tourists, who appear excited. (4) The group poses together, holding the pastry boxes and a Taiwan-themed souvenir hat, cheering 'Taiwan Love U'. (5) The video concludes with a quick succession of shots showing the creator taking photos with the fans and engaging in lively conversation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy BGM with a fast tempo starts immediately. Vocals include a mix of female and male voices shouting excitedly in English and Mandarin. (2) Shouted phrases like 'Welcome to Taiwan!' and 'We love you too!' are prominent over the music. (3) Continuous ambient noise from a busy store environment and crowd chatter is audible beneath the main dialogue and music. (4) The audio cuts frequently to match the visual pacing, maintaining a fragmented but high-energy soundscape.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'We come from UK' - Functional subtitle. (2) 'POV:當I96的嘎哥 遇到大寫E人的英國姐姐們' - Hook text regarding introvert/extrovert personalities. (3) 'WELCOME TO TAIWAN' - Large decorative title. (4) 'Taiwan Love U' - Emotional variety-show style text. (5) '看到好多外國人在拍老闆 覺得是明星明星' - Commentary text about the creator's popularity. (6) '英國粉絲Get!' - Success caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Greeting -> Store interaction/Promotion -> Fan signing -> Group celebration

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 4-5 female tourists, 2 crew members, and at least 4 visible onlookers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young male with a vibrant personality, wearing a purple t-shirt and a matching purple baseball cap with a white 'B' logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a brightly lit 'SUNTORY PASTRY' store, featuring large displays of purple product boxes and brand posters.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio lights with portable lighting equipment visible.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Interaction -> Demonstration of popularity -> Call to action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional tool for 'SUNTORY PASTRY' by showcasing an energetic and organic interaction between a popular local creator and international tourists. It leverages the 'extrovert' (E-person) personality trope to create a fun, viral-style clip that positions the store as a 'must-visit' destination for tourists in Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is wearing branded-color clothing, signing boxes of the product, and the entire video is filmed within the brand's retail location with logos clearly visible.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of MBTI-style labels (I vs E) and 'celebrity boss' framing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video successfully merges celebrity influence with tourism promotion, using high-paced editing typical of TikTok/Reels to maintain viewer engagement.
